overall_feedback: Total score: 83.3/100. 8 hypotheses, 11 data sources, report length 23342 chars. Consider DID causal inference. Clean window methodology applied. Confounders discussed.
strengths: Uses 11 data sources with statistical tests
Decomposes growth into incremental vs cannibalization
